name: Weight Watchers Spicy Turkey Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Italian tomatoes; canned, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 3-quart saucepan with nonstick spray and heat over medium-high heat.
Add turkey and onion. Using the back of a wooden spoon, crumble the meat.
Cook, stirring occasionally, until the turkey is browned, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and stir well to combine. Reduce heat to low
and let simmer, stirring occasionally, until the chili thickens, about 25 to
30 minutes. Remove the bay leaf before serving. May be frozen for future use
- just thaw and reheat.
Makes two servings, each providing: 2.5 Protein and 2.5 Vegetables.
